run_contract.current_blocker: The skill still lacks a strong enough top-level anchor tying ohmg to the Gemini or Antigravity surface and Serena Memory; setup-only guidance improved but did not generalize.
run_contract.next_action: Keep this mutation, then test one focused mutation that makes Gemini-or-Antigravity framing plus Serena Memory non-optional for explicit ohmg help prompts.

experiments.description: Baseline run with the current ohmg skill wording.
Add a top-of-skill response contract to anchor ohmg answers to documented surfaces.
Strengthen setup verification to require doctor and reject indirect checks.
